issues.objection: A cynical writer's mocking gloss of 4.38 would target either (a) 'just be detached, bro' or (b) 'work harder, but spiritual.' The engineering layer forecloses both: the falsifiability field explicitly rejects the soft reading; the counter_example explicitly carves out where the verse does not apply. The quotable_line ('Two assumptions replaced, one confirmed, one demonstrated wrong. The year's purification was the burning out of the wrong model.') is concrete enough to resist parody.

notes: Cynical-writer test for 4.38: identify the parody-handle. The verse does not give one — the engineering layer is anchored to specific tooling and specific configurations; the quotable line is testable on the artifact, not on affect. PASS.
